scripts.label: Open Jira ticket and capture evidence
scripts.description: Opens the selected Jira ticket in an authenticated runner session and captures baseline page evidence.

scripts.label: GolfNow Central smoke check
scripts.description: Runs a locked smoke script against the approved GolfNow Central environment and publishes evidence back to the job record.

scripts.label: Dashboard regression smoke
scripts.description: Verifies the 123 dashboard view toggles, filters, selected ticket panel, and Jira action links after each UI change.
